column19: Topography : Region (Peripheral zone:PZ - Transitional zone: TZ - Cental Zone: CZ - Fibromuscular stroma: FS)
column28: Symptoms 1. Difficulty starting urination 2.  Weak or interrupted flow of urine 3. Frequent urination especially at night 4. Difficulty emptying the bladder completely 5. Pain or burning during urination 6. Blood in the urine or semen 7. Pain in the back
